description: Complete a procure-to-pay cycle with landed cost allocation for GardenWorld. Create a Standard Purchase Order to 'Seed Farm Inc.' for 200 units of 'Azalea Bush' at the listed purchase price and complete it. Process a Material Receipt for the full PO quantity. Create and complete a matched Vendor Invoice for the goods. Next, create a second Vendor Invoice from the same vendor for $75.00 using the 'Freight Charges' charge, and on the invoice line's 'Landed Costs' tab link the freight to the material receipt, then complete the invoice. Finally, process a single outgoing Vendor Payment for the combined total of both invoices using check number 'CHK-P2P-2026', and use Payment Allocation to allocate it against both invoices. Login credentials: GardenAdmin / GardenAdmin.
